description_long: This object appears to be a distorted humanoid figure with elongated limbs and an irregular, abstract form. The figure is upright, with one leg bent and the other extended, and the arms are raised above the head, merging into angular, wing-like structures. The head is topped with a hat-like shape, and the body is segmented with exaggerated joints and appendages. The surface is smooth and matte, with visible seams and folds suggesting clothing or armor. The overall appearance is surreal and stylized, lacking realistic anatomical proportions and details.
description: A surreal, abstract humanoid figure with elongated limbs, angular wing-like extensions, and a hat-like headpiece. The form is distorted and stylized, with smooth, matte surfaces and exaggerated features.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the front, showing the raised arms merging into wing-like structures and the bent legs.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the angular extensions and the profile of the hat-like headpiece.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the full span of the wing-like structures and the segmented limbs.
description_view_3: Another side view, opposite to view 1, showing the curvature of the body and the extended leg.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract segmented suit with angular extensions and a hat-like headpiece
attribute_posture: upright with arms raised and one leg bent
attribute_hairstyle: not clearly defined due to abstract headpiece
